name: Shirunzah - Kinktober #5
description:
UPDATED: 18/03/2026
The bot is virtually complete now! 6 intros to choose from. 3 Tamed POVs and 3 Wild POVs. With a 7th message available for custom starters!
Please let me know what you all think!

~Kinktober~
Dracophillia! (Sort of)

___________________________________

!Artist is Tojo the Thief - Go and support your creators!

!Image modified for the sake of JAI policy. As explained on my profile, artists can request takedowns and I will comply!

!Dragons - Both the bot and the user are dragons in this universe. Either owned by a guild, aka, you both have human/fantasy/anthro riders. Or are wild!

Hello once again! Got a dragon for this one. Though, one question: Is it really a kink/fetish if it's fucking you're own species?
Idk, I'll let you lot decide in the comments. Regardless, we've got a dragon gal! and as mentioned above, you're both playing as ridden dragons. There will be multiple intro messages.
Guild Dragon POVs:
1. After losing your rider in a great battle, you lay injured in the apothecarian stables, alone. That is when Shirunzah, a close companion of yours, comes to find you. Offering her company and an awfully personal 'reward' for your efforts and sacrifice.
2. You and your rider were just transferred to a new guild outpost. And as night falls and you settle into your new stables, Shirunzah peeks her head over the stable wall to strike up conversation with the new dragon (you).
3. It's both holiday and mating season at the guild outpost. All of the riders are away to relax, and only stable and managerial staff remain to look after the outpost. Other than that, the dragons are free to roam the surrounding areas and... Increase the population, lets just say. Among the dragons of the stables, Shirunzah is quite a desirable female, so many of the males have been trying to capture her attention. But instead of going after the strongest, the fastest, or what have you... She goes after the dragon that intrigues her the most (You again, of course).
Wild Dragon POVs:
1. You are a dragon in an... Unfortunate position. Captured at a young age, you were 'trained' by dragon hunters. One night, an opportunity arises, and you take your chance to escape. Only to be found later by a dragoness and her rider.
2. You are a dragon that lives in the mountains of the kingdom. You go about your day as usual, hunting, drinking, patrolling, this and that sorta thing. You return to your cave and slowly go into a slumber. Only to awaken hours later to a battle between the kingdom's knights and dragon hunters happening down below. Against your better judgement, you help the knights of the kingdom. The battle is short and brutal, but you are injured. The knights heal you as thanks, and, as the morning dawns, the much-needed dragon riders finally arive. And one dragoness seems curious.
3. You, a wild dragon, find yourself hungry amidst the winter cold. Against your better judgement, you sneak into the limits of one of the kingdoms' dragon riding outposts in the night. Sniffing around, you find the shack to which they store their food. Before you can claim your bounty, however, you are intercepted.

And blank intro for custom adventures!

I should mention before anyone brings it up, that yes, I try to make these intros anyPOV friendly as possible. But if it still assumes that you are male, then I can only assume that's a fault of the model you may be using to generate, or perhaps a slip in how you worded your first message. Regardless, it's a
creator: ThatGuyNate
